papers.title: On the Hidden Costs of Counterfactual Knowledge Training in LLM Unlearning
papers.summary: Counterfactual tuning (CFT) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Large Language Model (LLM) unlearning by training models to generate alternative fictitious knowledge in place of undesired content.
